raw:
{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies a conceptual issue (contradiction between paragraphs) and proposes a reframing (resolving the contradiction), but the analysis is not fully developed.", "R1.2": "Identifies inconsistencies in the claims about the proof and convergence, but doesn't provide a complete walkthrough of the argument chain.", "R1.4": "Names prior works (FactorVAE, beta-TCVAE) and articulates some differences, but lacks a detailed comparison against 3-5 relevant works.", "RX.1": "All claims are presented with equal confidence despite highlighting potential issues and uncertainties.", "RX.3": "Mostly within scope, focusing on the proposed method's strengths and weaknesses, but misses discussing the limitations of the empirical evaluation.", "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the critique focuses on potential issues and lacks a thorough analysis for harmful content.", "RX.5": "Does not provide specific source tracing or justification for the claims made."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.2": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.6, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.7, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (contradiction between paragraphs) and proposes a reframing (resolving the contradiction), but the analysis is not fully developed.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies inconsistencies in the claims about the proof and convergence, but doesn't provide a complete walkthrough of the argument chain.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior works (FactorVAE, beta-TCVAE) and articulates some differences, but lacks a detailed comparison against 3-5 relevant works.
rationale.RX.1: All claims are presented with equal confidence despite highlighting potential issues and uncertainties.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, focusing on the proposed method's strengths and weaknesses, but misses discussing the limitations of the empirical evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the critique focuses on potential issues and lacks a thorough analysis for harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide specific source tracing or justification for the claims made.
